nameMeanings.name: Hywel
meanings: A Welsh name. Some write the name Hoel, which they render 'lordly;' if so, it may come from huail, a vice-regent, regent. Arthur derives the surname Howell from Corn. -Brit, houl, the sun; and he adds, high, exalted.' But Hywel is rather from hywel, conspicuous.

nameMeanings.name: Nest
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of Nest, a Welsh pet form of Agnes ; the name of the grandmother of the 12th-century chronicler Giraldus Cambrensis (‘Gerald the Welshman’).

nameMeanings.name: Verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

en.lifeSummary: When Nest Verch Hywel was born in 1224, in Senghenydd, Caerphilly, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Hywel Felyn ap Gruffudd, was 55 and her mother, Sara le Sore, was 41. She had at least 1 son with Llwelyn ap Bleddri.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nest Verch Hywel è nata il nel 1224 nel Senghenydd, Caerphilly, Galles, Regno Unito, sua padre, Hywel Felyn ap Gruffudd, aveva 55 anni e sua madre, Sara le Sore, aveva 41 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Llwelyn ap Bleddri.

ko.lifeSummary: Nest Verch Hywel(이)가 1224년 영국 웨일스 카이르필리 센게이니드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hywel Felyn ap Gruffudd(은)는 55세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sara le Sore(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 Llwelyn ap Bleddri(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nest Verch Hywel родилась в 1224 г. в местности сеньхенидд, каирфилли, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Hywel Felyn ap Gruffudd было 55 лет, а матери, которую звали Sara le Sore, 41. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Llwelyn ap Bleddri.
